raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent reframed the original text to improve clarity and tone, avoiding unsupported superlatives.",
    "R1.4": "The agent identified one prior work (Qulac dataset) but did not map against multiple works or articulate sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged missing citations for some claims but did not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "The agent marked uncertainty for some claims and provided evidence, but could have been more explicit about confidence levels.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies potential issues with prior work (e.g., post-hoc patches).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with a brief explanation, but could have included more detailed source information."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent reframed the original text to improve clarity and tone, avoiding unsupported superlatives.
rationale.R1.4: The agent identified one prior work (Qulac dataset) but did not map against multiple works or articulate sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations for some claims but did not audit every load-bearing citation with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: The agent marked uncertainty for some claims and provided evidence, but could have been more explicit about confidence levels.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies potential issues with prior work (e.g., post-hoc patches).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with a brief explanation, but could have included more detailed source information.
